1441 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_POWERSOURCE_FAULT=2048, /* The power source supplying the generator failed e.g. mechanical generator stopped, tether is no longer providing power, solar cell is in shade, hydrogen reaction no longer happening. | */
1442 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_COMMUNICATION_WARNING=4096, /* Generator controller having communication problems. | */
1443 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_COOLING_WARNING=8192, /* Power electronic or generator cooling system error. | */
1444 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_POWER_RAIL_FAULT=16384, /* Generator controller power rail experienced a fault. | */
1445 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_OVERCURRENT_FAULT=32768, /* Generator controller exceeded the overcurrent threshold and shutdown to prevent damage. | */
1446 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_BATTERY_OVERCHARGE_CURRENT_FAULT=65536, /* Generator controller detected a high current going into the batteries and shutdown to prevent battery damage. | */
1447 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_OVERVOLTAGE_FAULT=131072, /* Generator controller exceeded it's overvoltage threshold and shutdown to prevent it exceeding the voltage rating. | */
1448 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_BATTERY_UNDERVOLT_FAULT=262144, /* Batteries are under voltage (generator will not start). | */
1449 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_START_INHIBITED=524288, /* Generator start is inhibited by e.g. a safety switch. | */
1450 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_MAINTENANCE_REQUIRED=1048576, /* Generator requires maintenance. | */
1451 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_WARMING_UP=2097152, /* Generator is not ready to generate yet. | */
1452 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_IDLE=4194304, /* Generator is idle. | */
1453 MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG_ENUM_END=4194305, /* | */
1454} MAV_GENERATOR_STATUS_FLAG;
1455#endif
1456
1457/** @brief Enumeration of VTOL states */
1458#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_VTOL_STATE
1459#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_VTOL_STATE
1460typedef enum MAV_VTOL_STATE
1461{
1462 MAV_VTOL_STATE_UNDEFINED=0, /* MAV is not configured as VTOL | */
1463 MAV_VTOL_STATE_TRANSITION_TO_FW=1, /* VTOL is in transition from multicopter to fixed-wing | */
1464 MAV_VTOL_STATE_TRANSITION_TO_MC=2, /* VTOL is in transition from fixed-wing to multicopter | */
1465 MAV_VTOL_STATE_MC=3, /* VTOL is in multicopter state | */
1466 MAV_VTOL_STATE_FW=4, /* VTOL is in fixed-wing state | */
1467 MAV_VTOL_STATE_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
1468} MAV_VTOL_STATE;
1469#endif
1470
1471/** @brief Enumeration of landed detector states */
1472#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_LANDED_STATE
1473#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_LANDED_STATE
1474typedef enum MAV_LANDED_STATE
1475{
1476 MAV_LANDED_STATE_UNDEFINED=0, /* MAV landed state is unknown | */
1477 MAV_LANDED_STATE_ON_GROUND=1, /* MAV is landed (on ground) | */
1478 MAV_LANDED_STATE_IN_AIR=2, /* MAV is in air | */
1479 MAV_LANDED_STATE_TAKEOFF=3, /* MAV currently taking off | */
1480 MAV_LANDED_STATE_LANDING=4, /* MAV currently landing | */
1481 MAV_LANDED_STATE_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
1482} MAV_LANDED_STATE;
1483#endif
1484
1485/** @brief Enumeration of the ADSB altimeter types */
1486#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_ADSB_ALTITUDE_TYPE
1487#define HAVE_ENUM_ADSB_ALTITUDE_TYPE
1488typedef enum ADSB_ALTITUDE_TYPE
1489{
1490 ADSB_ALTITUDE_TYPE_PRESSURE_QNH=0, /* Altitude reported from a Baro source using QNH reference | */
1491 ADSB_ALTITUDE_TYPE_GEOMETRIC=1, /* Altitude reported from a GNSS source | */
1492 ADSB_ALTITUDE_TYPE_ENUM_END=2, /* | */
1493} ADSB_ALTITUDE_TYPE;
1494#endif
1495
1496/** @brief ADSB classification for the type of vehicle emitting the transponder signal */
1497#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE
1498#define HAVE_ENUM_ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE
1499typedef enum ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE
1500{
1501 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_NO_INFO=0, /* | */
1502 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_LIGHT=1, /* | */
1503 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_SMALL=2, /* | */
1504 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_LARGE=3, /* | */
1505 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_HIGH_VORTEX_LARGE=4, /* | */
1506 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_HEAVY=5, /* | */
1507 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_HIGHLY_MANUV=6, /* | */
1508 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_ROTOCRAFT=7, /* | */
1509 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_UNASSIGNED=8, /* | */
1510 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_GLIDER=9, /* | */
1511 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_LIGHTER_AIR=10, /* | */
1512 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_PARACHUTE=11, /* | */
1513 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_ULTRA_LIGHT=12, /* | */
1514 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_UNASSIGNED2=13, /* | */
1515 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_UAV=14, /* | */
1516 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_SPACE=15, /* | */
1517 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_UNASSGINED3=16, /* | */
1518 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_EMERGENCY_SURFACE=17, /* | */
1519 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_SERVICE_SURFACE=18, /* | */
1520 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_POINT_OBSTACLE=19, /* | */
1521 ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE_ENUM_END=20, /* | */
1522} ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE;
1523#endif
1524
1525/** @brief These flags indicate status such as data validity of each data source. Set = data valid */
1526#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_ADSB_FLAGS
1527#define HAVE_ENUM_ADSB_FLAGS
1528typedef enum ADSB_FLAGS
1529{
1530 ADSB_FLAGS_VALID_COORDS=1, /* | */
1531 ADSB_FLAGS_VALID_ALTITUDE=2, /* | */
1532 ADSB_FLAGS_VALID_HEADING=4, /* | */
1533 ADSB_FLAGS_VALID_VELOCITY=8, /* | */
1534 ADSB_FLAGS_VALID_CALLSIGN=16, /* | */
1535 ADSB_FLAGS_VALID_SQUAWK=32, /* | */
1536 ADSB_FLAGS_SIMULATED=64, /* | */
1537 ADSB_FLAGS_VERTICAL_VELOCITY_VALID=128, /* | */
1538 ADSB_FLAGS_BARO_VALID=256, /* | */
1539 ADSB_FLAGS_SOURCE_UAT=32768, /* | */
1540 ADSB_FLAGS_ENUM_END=32769, /* | */
1541} ADSB_FLAGS;
1542#endif
1543
1544/** @brief Bitmap of options for the MAV_CMD_DO_REPOSITION */
1545#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_DO_REPOSITION_FLAGS
1546#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_DO_REPOSITION_FLAGS
1547typedef enum MAV_DO_REPOSITION_FLAGS
1548{
1549 MAV_DO_REPOSITION_FLAGS_CHANGE_MODE=1, /* The aircraft should immediately transition into guided. This should not be set for follow me applications | */
1550 MAV_DO_REPOSITION_FLAGS_RELATIVE_YAW=2, /* Yaw relative to the vehicle current heading (if not set, relative to North). | */
1551 MAV_DO_REPOSITION_FLAGS_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
1552} MAV_DO_REPOSITION_FLAGS;
1553#endif
1554
1555/** @brief Speed setpoint types used in MAV_CMD_DO_CHANGE_SPEED */
1556#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_SPEED_TYPE
1557#define HAVE_ENUM_SPEED_TYPE
1558typedef enum SPEED_TYPE
1559{
1560 SPEED_TYPE_AIRSPEED=0, /* Airspeed | */
1561 SPEED_TYPE_GROUNDSPEED=1, /* Groundspeed | */
1562 SPEED_TYPE_CLIMB_SPEED=2, /* Climb speed | */
1563 SPEED_TYPE_DESCENT_SPEED=3, /* Descent speed | */
1564 SPEED_TYPE_ENUM_END=4, /* | */
1565} SPEED_TYPE;
1566#endif
1567
1568/** @brief Flags in ESTIMATOR_STATUS message */
1569#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_ESTIMATOR_STATUS_FLAGS
1570#define HAVE_ENUM_ESTIMATOR_STATUS_FLAGS
1571typedef enum ESTIMATOR_STATUS_FLAGS
1572{
1573 ESTIMATOR_ATTITUDE=1, /* True if the attitude estimate is good | */
1574 ESTIMATOR_VELOCITY_HORIZ=2, /* True if the horizontal velocity estimate is good | */
1575 ESTIMATOR_VELOCITY_VERT=4, /* True if the vertical velocity estimate is good | */
1576 ESTIMATOR_POS_HORIZ_REL=8, /* True if the horizontal position (relative) estimate is good | */
1577 ESTIMATOR_POS_HORIZ_ABS=16, /* True if the horizontal position (absolute) estimate is good | */
1578 ESTIMATOR_POS_VERT_ABS=32, /* True if the vertical position (absolute) estimate is good | */
1579 ESTIMATOR_POS_VERT_AGL=64, /* True if the vertical position (above ground) estimate is good | */
1580 ESTIMATOR_CONST_POS_MODE=128, /* True if the EKF is in a constant position mode and is not using external measurements (eg GPS or optical flow) | */
1581 ESTIMATOR_PRED_POS_HORIZ_REL=256, /* True if the EKF has sufficient data to enter a mode that will provide a (relative) position estimate | */
1582 ESTIMATOR_PRED_POS_HORIZ_ABS=512, /* True if the EKF has sufficient data to enter a mode that will provide a (absolute) position estimate | */
1583 ESTIMATOR_GPS_GLITCH=1024, /* True if the EKF has detected a GPS glitch | */
1584 ESTIMATOR_ACCEL_ERROR=2048, /* True if the EKF has detected bad accelerometer data | */
1585 ESTIMATOR_STATUS_FLAGS_ENUM_END=2049, /* | */
1586} ESTIMATOR_STATUS_FLAGS;
1587#endif
1588
1589/** @brief Sequence that motors are tested when using MAV_CMD_DO_MOTOR_TEST. */
1590#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MOTOR_TEST_ORDER
1591#define HAVE_ENUM_MOTOR_TEST_ORDER
1592typedef enum MOTOR_TEST_ORDER
1593{
1594 MOTOR_TEST_ORDER_DEFAULT=0, /* Default autopilot motor test method. | */
1595 MOTOR_TEST_ORDER_SEQUENCE=1, /* Motor numbers are specified as their index in a predefined vehicle-specific sequence. | */
1596 MOTOR_TEST_ORDER_BOARD=2, /* Motor numbers are specified as the output as labeled on the board. | */
1597 MOTOR_TEST_ORDER_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
1598} MOTOR_TEST_ORDER;
1599#endif
1600
1601/** @brief Defines how throttle value is represented in MAV_CMD_DO_MOTOR_TEST. */
1602#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MOTOR_TEST_THROTTLE_TYPE
1603#define HAVE_ENUM_MOTOR_TEST_THROTTLE_TYPE
1604typedef enum MOTOR_TEST_THROTTLE_TYPE
1605{
1606 MOTOR_TEST_THROTTLE_PERCENT=0, /* Throttle as a percentage (0 ~ 100) | */
1607 MOTOR_TEST_THROTTLE_PWM=1, /* Throttle as an absolute PWM value (normally in range of 1000~2000). | */
1608 MOTOR_TEST_THROTTLE_PILOT=2, /* Throttle pass-through from pilot's transmitter. | */
1609 MOTOR_TEST_COMPASS_CAL=3, /* Per-motor compass calibration test. | */
1610 MOTOR_TEST_THROTTLE_TYPE_ENUM_END=4, /* | */
1611} MOTOR_TEST_THROTTLE_TYPE;
1612#endif
1613
1614/** @brief */
1615#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAGS
1616#define HAVE_ENUM_GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAGS
1617typedef enum GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAGS
1618{
1619 GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAG_ALT=1, /* ignore altitude field | */
1620 GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAG_HDOP=2, /* ignore hdop field | */
1621 GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAG_VDOP=4, /* ignore vdop field | */
1622 GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAG_VEL_HORIZ=8, /* ignore horizontal velocity field (vn and ve) | */
1623 GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAG_VEL_VERT=16, /* ignore vertical velocity field (vd) | */
1624 GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAG_SPEED_ACCURACY=32, /* ignore speed accuracy field | */
1625 GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAG_HORIZONTAL_ACCURACY=64, /* ignore horizontal accuracy field | */
1626 GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAG_VERTICAL_ACCURACY=128, /* ignore vertical accuracy field | */
1627 GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAGS_ENUM_END=129, /* | */
1628} GPS_INPUT_IGNORE_FLAGS;
1629#endif
1630
1631/** @brief Possible actions an aircraft can take to avoid a collision. */
1632#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_COLLISION_ACTION
1633#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_COLLISION_ACTION
1634typedef enum MAV_COLLISION_ACTION
1635{
1636 MAV_COLLISION_ACTION_NONE=0, /* Ignore any potential collisions | */
1637 MAV_COLLISION_ACTION_REPORT=1, /* Report potential collision | */
1638 MAV_COLLISION_ACTION_ASCEND_OR_DESCEND=2, /* Ascend or Descend to avoid threat | */
1639 MAV_COLLISION_ACTION_MOVE_HORIZONTALLY=3, /* Move horizontally to avoid threat | */
1640 MAV_COLLISION_ACTION_MOVE_PERPENDICULAR=4, /* Aircraft to move perpendicular to the collision's velocity vector | */
1641 MAV_COLLISION_ACTION_RTL=5, /* Aircraft to fly directly back to its launch point | */
1642 MAV_COLLISION_ACTION_HOVER=6, /* Aircraft to stop in place | */
1643 MAV_COLLISION_ACTION_ENUM_END=7, /* | */
1644} MAV_COLLISION_ACTION;
1645#endif
1646
1647/** @brief Aircraft-rated danger from this threat. */
1648#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_COLLISION_THREAT_LEVEL
1649#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_COLLISION_THREAT_LEVEL
1650typedef enum MAV_COLLISION_THREAT_LEVEL
1651{
1652 MAV_COLLISION_THREAT_LEVEL_NONE=0, /* Not a threat | */
1653 MAV_COLLISION_THREAT_LEVEL_LOW=1, /* Craft is mildly concerned about this threat | */
1654 MAV_COLLISION_THREAT_LEVEL_HIGH=2, /* Craft is panicking, and may take actions to avoid threat | */
1655 MAV_COLLISION_THREAT_LEVEL_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
1656} MAV_COLLISION_THREAT_LEVEL;
1657#endif
1658
1659/** @brief Source of information about this collision. */
1660#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_COLLISION_SRC
1661#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_COLLISION_SRC
1662typedef enum MAV_COLLISION_SRC
1663{
1664 MAV_COLLISION_SRC_ADSB=0, /* ID field references ADSB_VEHICLE packets | */
1665 MAV_COLLISION_SRC_MAVLINK_GPS_GLOBAL_INT=1, /* ID field references MAVLink SRC ID | */
1666 MAV_COLLISION_SRC_ENUM_END=2, /* | */
1667} MAV_COLLISION_SRC;
1668#endif
1669
1670/** @brief Type of GPS fix */
1671#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_GPS_FIX_TYPE
1672#define HAVE_ENUM_GPS_FIX_TYPE
1673typedef enum GPS_FIX_TYPE
1674{
1675 GPS_FIX_TYPE_NO_GPS=0, /* No GPS connected | */
1676 GPS_FIX_TYPE_NO_FIX=1, /* No position information, GPS is connected | */
1677 GPS_FIX_TYPE_2D_FIX=2, /* 2D position | */
1678 GPS_FIX_TYPE_3D_FIX=3, /* 3D position | */
1679 GPS_FIX_TYPE_DGPS=4, /* DGPS/SBAS aided 3D position | */
1680 GPS_FIX_TYPE_RTK_FLOAT=5, /* RTK float, 3D position | */
1681 GPS_FIX_TYPE_RTK_FIXED=6, /* RTK Fixed, 3D position | */
1682 GPS_FIX_TYPE_STATIC=7, /* Static fixed, typically used for base stations | */
1683 GPS_FIX_TYPE_PPP=8, /* PPP, 3D position. | */
1684 GPS_FIX_TYPE_ENUM_END=9, /* | */
1685} GPS_FIX_TYPE;
1686#endif
1687
1688/** @brief RTK GPS baseline coordinate system, used for RTK corrections */
1689#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_RTK_BASELINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM
1690#define HAVE_ENUM_RTK_BASELINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM
1691typedef enum RTK_BASELINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM
1692{
1693 RTK_BASELINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM_ECEF=0, /* Earth-centered, Earth-fixed | */
1694 RTK_BASELINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM_NED=1, /* RTK basestation centered, north, east, down | */
1695 RTK_BASELINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM_ENUM_END=2, /* | */
1696} RTK_BASELINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM;
1697#endif
1698
1699/** @brief Type of landing target */
1700#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_LANDING_TARGET_TYPE
1701#define HAVE_ENUM_LANDING_TARGET_TYPE
1702typedef enum LANDING_TARGET_TYPE
1703{
1704 LANDING_TARGET_TYPE_LIGHT_BEACON=0, /* Landing target signaled by light beacon (ex: IR-LOCK) | */
1705 LANDING_TARGET_TYPE_RADIO_BEACON=1, /* Landing target signaled by radio beacon (ex: ILS, NDB) | */
1706 LANDING_TARGET_TYPE_VISION_FIDUCIAL=2, /* Landing target represented by a fiducial marker (ex: ARTag) | */
1707 LANDING_TARGET_TYPE_VISION_OTHER=3, /* Landing target represented by a pre-defined visual shape/feature (ex: X-marker, H-marker, square) | */
1708 LANDING_TARGET_TYPE_ENUM_END=4, /* | */
1709} LANDING_TARGET_TYPE;
1710#endif
1711
1712/** @brief Direction of VTOL transition */
1713#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_VTOL_TRANSITION_HEADING
1714#define HAVE_ENUM_VTOL_TRANSITION_HEADING
1715typedef enum VTOL_TRANSITION_HEADING
1716{
1717 VTOL_TRANSITION_HEADING_VEHICLE_DEFAULT=0, /* Respect the heading configuration of the vehicle. | */
1718 VTOL_TRANSITION_HEADING_NEXT_WAYPOINT=1, /* Use the heading pointing towards the next waypoint. | */
1719 VTOL_TRANSITION_HEADING_TAKEOFF=2, /* Use the heading on takeoff (while sitting on the ground). | */
1720 VTOL_TRANSITION_HEADING_SPECIFIED=3, /* Use the specified heading in parameter 4. | */
1721 VTOL_TRANSITION_HEADING_ANY=4, /* Use the current heading when reaching takeoff altitude (potentially facing the wind when weather-vaning is active). | */
1722 VTOL_TRANSITION_HEADING_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
1723} VTOL_TRANSITION_HEADING;
1724#endif
1725
1726/** @brief Camera capability flags (Bitmap) */
1727#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS
1728#define HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS
1729typedef enum CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS
1730{
1731 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_CAPTURE_VIDEO=1, /* Camera is able to record video | */
1732 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_CAPTURE_IMAGE=2, /* Camera is able to capture images | */
1733 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_MODES=4, /* Camera has separate Video and Image/Photo modes (MAV_CMD_SET_CAMERA_MODE) | */
1734 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_CAN_CAPTURE_IMAGE_IN_VIDEO_MODE=8, /* Camera can capture images while in video mode | */
1735 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_CAN_CAPTURE_VIDEO_IN_IMAGE_MODE=16, /* Camera can capture videos while in Photo/Image mode | */
1736 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_IMAGE_SURVEY_MODE=32, /* Camera has image survey mode (MAV_CMD_SET_CAMERA_MODE) | */
1737 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_BASIC_ZOOM=64, /* Camera has basic zoom control (MAV_CMD_SET_CAMERA_ZOOM) | */
1738 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_BASIC_FOCUS=128, /* Camera has basic focus control (MAV_CMD_SET_CAMERA_FOCUS) | */
1739 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_VIDEO_STREAM=256, /* Camera has video streaming capabilities (request VIDEO_STREAM_INFORMATION with MAV_CMD_REQUEST_MESSAGE for video streaming info) | */
1740 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_TRACKING_POINT=512, /* Camera supports tracking of a point on the camera view. | */
1741 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_TRACKING_RECTANGLE=1024, /* Camera supports tracking of a selection rectangle on the camera view. | */
1742 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_TRACKING_GEO_STATUS=2048, /* Camera supports tracking geo status (CAMERA_TRACKING_GEO_STATUS). | */
1743 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_THERMAL_RANGE=4096, /* Camera supports absolute thermal range (request CAMERA_THERMAL_RANGE with MAV_CMD_REQUEST_MESSAGE). | */
1744 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_MTI=8192, /* Camera supports Moving Target Indicators (MTI) on the camera view (using MAV_CMD_CAMERA_START_MTI). | */
1745 CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_ENUM_END=8193, /* | */
1746} CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS;
1747#endif
1748
1749/** @brief Stream status flags (Bitmap) */
1750#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_VIDEO_STREAM_STATUS_FLAGS
1751#define HAVE_ENUM_VIDEO_STREAM_STATUS_FLAGS
1752typedef enum VIDEO_STREAM_STATUS_FLAGS
1753{
1754 VIDEO_STREAM_STATUS_FLAGS_RUNNING=1, /* Stream is active (running) | */
1755 VIDEO_STREAM_STATUS_FLAGS_THERMAL=2, /* Stream is thermal imaging | */
1756 VIDEO_STREAM_STATUS_FLAGS_THERMAL_RANGE_ENABLED=4, /* Stream can report absolute thermal range (see CAMERA_THERMAL_RANGE). | */
1757 VIDEO_STREAM_STATUS_FLAGS_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
1758} VIDEO_STREAM_STATUS_FLAGS;
1759#endif
1760
1761/** @brief Video stream types */
1762#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE
1763#define HAVE_ENUM_VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE
1764typedef enum VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE
1765{
1766 VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE_RTSP=0, /* Stream is RTSP | */
1767 VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE_RTPUDP=1, /* Stream is RTP UDP (URI gives the port number) | */
1768 VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE_TCP_MPEG=2, /* Stream is MPEG on TCP | */
1769 VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE_MPEG_TS=3, /* Stream is MPEG TS (URI gives the port number) | */
1770 VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE_ENUM_END=4, /* | */
1771} VIDEO_STREAM_TYPE;
1772#endif
1773
1774/** @brief Video stream encodings */
1775#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_VIDEO_STREAM_ENCODING
1776#define HAVE_ENUM_VIDEO_STREAM_ENCODING
1777typedef enum VIDEO_STREAM_ENCODING
1778{
1779 VIDEO_STREAM_ENCODING_UNKNOWN=0, /* Stream encoding is unknown | */
1780 VIDEO_STREAM_ENCODING_H264=1, /* Stream encoding is H.264 | */
1781 VIDEO_STREAM_ENCODING_H265=2, /* Stream encoding is H.265 | */
1782 VIDEO_STREAM_ENCODING_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
1783} VIDEO_STREAM_ENCODING;
1784#endif
1785
1786/** @brief Camera tracking status flags */
1787#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_TRACKING_STATUS_FLAGS
1788#define HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_TRACKING_STATUS_FLAGS
1789typedef enum CAMERA_TRACKING_STATUS_FLAGS
1790{
1791 CAMERA_TRACKING_STATUS_FLAGS_IDLE=0, /* Camera is not tracking | */
1792 CAMERA_TRACKING_STATUS_FLAGS_ACTIVE=1, /* Camera is tracking | */
1793 CAMERA_TRACKING_STATUS_FLAGS_ERROR=2, /* Camera tracking in error state | */
1794 CAMERA_TRACKING_STATUS_FLAGS_MTI=4, /* Camera Moving Target Indicators (MTI) are active | */
1795 CAMERA_TRACKING_STATUS_FLAGS_COASTING=8, /* Camera tracking target is obscured and is being predicted | */
1796 CAMERA_TRACKING_STATUS_FLAGS_ENUM_END=9, /* | */
1797} CAMERA_TRACKING_STATUS_FLAGS;
1798#endif
1799
1800/** @brief Camera tracking modes */
1801#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_TRACKING_MODE
1802#define HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_TRACKING_MODE
1803typedef enum CAMERA_TRACKING_MODE
1804{
1805 CAMERA_TRACKING_MODE_NONE=0, /* Not tracking | */
1806 CAMERA_TRACKING_MODE_POINT=1, /* Target is a point | */
1807 CAMERA_TRACKING_MODE_RECTANGLE=2, /* Target is a rectangle | */
1808 CAMERA_TRACKING_MODE_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
1809} CAMERA_TRACKING_MODE;
1810#endif
1811
1812/** @brief Camera tracking target data (shows where tracked target is within image) */
1813#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_TRACKING_TARGET_DATA
1814#define HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_TRACKING_TARGET_DATA
1815typedef enum CAMERA_TRACKING_TARGET_DATA
1816{
1817 CAMERA_TRACKING_TARGET_DATA_EMBEDDED=1, /* Target data embedded in image data (proprietary) | */
1818 CAMERA_TRACKING_TARGET_DATA_RENDERED=2, /* Target data rendered in image | */
1819 CAMERA_TRACKING_TARGET_DATA_IN_STATUS=4, /* Target data within status message (Point or Rectangle) | */
1820 CAMERA_TRACKING_TARGET_DATA_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
1821} CAMERA_TRACKING_TARGET_DATA;
1822#endif
1823
1824/** @brief Zoom types for MAV_CMD_SET_CAMERA_ZOOM */
1825#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_ZOOM_TYPE
1826#define HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_ZOOM_TYPE
1827typedef enum CAMERA_ZOOM_TYPE
1828{
1829 ZOOM_TYPE_STEP=0, /* Zoom one step increment (-1 for wide, 1 for tele) | */
1830 ZOOM_TYPE_CONTINUOUS=1, /* Continuous normalized zoom in/out rate until stopped. Range -1..1, negative: wide, positive: narrow/tele, 0 to stop zooming. Other values should be clipped to the range. | */
1831 ZOOM_TYPE_RANGE=2, /* Zoom value as proportion of full camera range (a percentage value between 0.0 and 100.0) | */
1832 ZOOM_TYPE_FOCAL_LENGTH=3, /* Zoom value/variable focal length in millimetres. Note that there is no message to get the valid zoom range of the camera, so this can type can only be used for cameras where the zoom range is known (implying that this cannot reliably be used in a GCS for an arbitrary camera) | */
1833 ZOOM_TYPE_HORIZONTAL_FOV=4, /* Zoom value as horizontal field of view in degrees. | */
1834 CAMERA_ZOOM_TYPE_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
1835} CAMERA_ZOOM_TYPE;
1836#endif
1837
1838/** @brief Focus types for MAV_CMD_SET_CAMERA_FOCUS */
1839#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_SET_FOCUS_TYPE
1840#define HAVE_ENUM_SET_FOCUS_TYPE
1841typedef enum SET_FOCUS_TYPE
1842{
1843 FOCUS_TYPE_STEP=0, /* Focus one step increment (-1 for focusing in, 1 for focusing out towards infinity). | */
1844 FOCUS_TYPE_CONTINUOUS=1, /* Continuous normalized focus in/out rate until stopped. Range -1..1, negative: in, positive: out towards infinity, 0 to stop focusing. Other values should be clipped to the range. | */
1845 FOCUS_TYPE_RANGE=2, /* Focus value as proportion of full camera focus range (a value between 0.0 and 100.0) | */
1846 FOCUS_TYPE_METERS=3, /* Focus value in metres. Note that there is no message to get the valid focus range of the camera, so this can type can only be used for cameras where the range is known (implying that this cannot reliably be used in a GCS for an arbitrary camera). | */
1847 FOCUS_TYPE_AUTO=4, /* Focus automatically. | */
1848 FOCUS_TYPE_AUTO_SINGLE=5, /* Single auto focus. Mainly used for still pictures. Usually abbreviated as AF-S. | */
1849 FOCUS_TYPE_AUTO_CONTINUOUS=6, /* Continuous auto focus. Mainly used for dynamic scenes. Abbreviated as AF-C. | */
1850 SET_FOCUS_TYPE_ENUM_END=7, /* | */
1851} SET_FOCUS_TYPE;
1852#endif
1853
1854/** @brief Camera sources for MAV_CMD_SET_CAMERA_SOURCE */
1855#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_SOURCE
1856#define HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_SOURCE
1857typedef enum CAMERA_SOURCE
1858{
1859 CAMERA_SOURCE_DEFAULT=0, /* Default camera source. | */
1860 CAMERA_SOURCE_RGB=1, /* RGB camera source. | */
1861 CAMERA_SOURCE_IR=2, /* IR camera source. | */
1862 CAMERA_SOURCE_NDVI=3, /* NDVI camera source. | */
1863 CAMERA_SOURCE_ENUM_END=4, /* | */
1864} CAMERA_SOURCE;
1865#endif
1866
1867/** @brief Result from PARAM_EXT_SET message. */
1868#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_PARAM_ACK
1869#define HAVE_ENUM_PARAM_ACK
1870typedef enum PARAM_ACK
1871{
1872 PARAM_ACK_ACCEPTED=0, /* Parameter value ACCEPTED and SET | */
1873 PARAM_ACK_VALUE_UNSUPPORTED=1, /* Parameter value UNKNOWN/UNSUPPORTED | */
1874 PARAM_ACK_FAILED=2, /* Parameter failed to set | */
1875 PARAM_ACK_IN_PROGRESS=3, /* Parameter value received but not yet set/accepted. A subsequent PARAM_EXT_ACK with the final result will follow once operation is completed. This is returned immediately for parameters that take longer to set, indicating that the the parameter was received and does not need to be resent. | */
1876 PARAM_ACK_ENUM_END=4, /* | */
1877} PARAM_ACK;
1878#endif
1879
1880/** @brief Camera Modes. */
1881#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_MODE
1882#define HAVE_ENUM_CAMERA_MODE
1883typedef enum CAMERA_MODE
1884{
1885 CAMERA_MODE_IMAGE=0, /* Camera is in image/photo capture mode. | */
1886 CAMERA_MODE_VIDEO=1, /* Camera is in video capture mode. | */
1887 CAMERA_MODE_IMAGE_SURVEY=2, /* Camera is in image survey capture mode. It allows for camera controller to do specific settings for surveys. | */
1888 CAMERA_MODE_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
1889} CAMERA_MODE;
1890#endif
1891
1892/** @brief Reasons for denying an authorization request made with MAV_CMD_ARM_AUTHORIZATION_REQUEST. If the COMMAND_ACK result is MAV_RESULT_DENIED, this is used to set the reason in the result_param2 field. */
1893#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON
1894#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON
1895typedef enum MAV_ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON
1896{
1897 MAV_ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON_GENERIC=0, /* Not a specific reason | */
1898 MAV_ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON_NONE=1, /* Authorizer will send the error as string to GCS | */
1899 MAV_ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON_INVALID_WAYPOINT=2, /* At least one waypoint have a invalid value | */
1900 MAV_ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON_TIMEOUT=3, /* Timeout in the authorizer process(in case it depends on network) | */
1901 MAV_ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON_AIRSPACE_IN_USE=4, /* Airspace of the mission in use by another vehicle, second result parameter can have the waypoint id that caused it to be denied. | */
1902 MAV_ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON_BAD_WEATHER=5, /* Weather is not good to fly | */
1903 MAV_ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON_ENUM_END=6, /* | */
1904} MAV_ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON;
1905#endif
1906
1907/** @brief RC type. Used in MAV_CMD_START_RX_PAIR. */
1908#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_RC_TYPE
1909#define HAVE_ENUM_RC_TYPE
1910typedef enum RC_TYPE
1911{
1912 RC_TYPE_SPEKTRUM=0, /* Spektrum | */
1913 RC_TYPE_CRSF=1, /* CRSF | */
1914 RC_TYPE_ENUM_END=2, /* | */
1915} RC_TYPE;
1916#endif
1917
1918/** @brief RC sub-type of types defined in RC_TYPE. Used in MAV_CMD_START_RX_PAIR. Ignored if value does not correspond to the set RC_TYPE. */
1919#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_RC_SUB_TYPE
1920#define HAVE_ENUM_RC_SUB_TYPE
1921typedef enum RC_SUB_TYPE
1922{
1923 RC_SUB_TYPE_SPEKTRUM_DSM2=0, /* Spektrum DSM2 | */
1924 RC_SUB_TYPE_SPEKTRUM_DSMX=1, /* Spektrum DSMX | */
1925 RC_SUB_TYPE_SPEKTRUM_DSMX8=2, /* Spektrum DSMX8 | */
1926 RC_SUB_TYPE_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
1927} RC_SUB_TYPE;
1928#endif
1929
1930/** @brief Engine control options */
1931#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_ENGINE_CONTROL_OPTIONS
1932#define HAVE_ENUM_ENGINE_CONTROL_OPTIONS
1933typedef enum ENGINE_CONTROL_OPTIONS
1934{
1935 ENGINE_CONTROL_OPTIONS_ALLOW_START_WHILE_DISARMED=1, /* Allow starting the engine while disarmed (without changing the vehicle's armed state). This effectively arms just the ICE, without arming the vehicle to start other motors or propellers. | */
1936 ENGINE_CONTROL_OPTIONS_ENUM_END=2, /* | */
1937} ENGINE_CONTROL_OPTIONS;
1938#endif
1939
1940/** @brief Bitmap to indicate which dimensions should be ignored by the vehicle: a value of 0b0000000000000000 or 0b0000001000000000 indicates that none of the setpoint dimensions should be ignored. If bit 9 is set the floats afx afy afz should be interpreted as force instead of acceleration. */
1941#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK
1942#define HAVE_ENUM_POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK
1943typedef enum POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK
1944{
1945 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_X_IGNORE=1, /* Ignore position x | */
1946 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_Y_IGNORE=2, /* Ignore position y | */
1947 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_Z_IGNORE=4, /* Ignore position z | */
1948 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_VX_IGNORE=8, /* Ignore velocity x | */
1949 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_VY_IGNORE=16, /* Ignore velocity y | */
1950 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_VZ_IGNORE=32, /* Ignore velocity z | */
1951 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_AX_IGNORE=64, /* Ignore acceleration x | */
1952 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_AY_IGNORE=128, /* Ignore acceleration y | */
1953 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_AZ_IGNORE=256, /* Ignore acceleration z | */
1954 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_FORCE_SET=512, /* Use force instead of acceleration | */
1955 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_YAW_IGNORE=1024, /* Ignore yaw | */
1956 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_YAW_RATE_IGNORE=2048, /* Ignore yaw rate | */
1957 POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK_ENUM_END=2049, /* | */
1958} POSITION_TARGET_TYPEMASK;
1959#endif
1960
1961/** @brief Bitmap to indicate which dimensions should be ignored by the vehicle: a value of 0b00000000 indicates that none of the setpoint dimensions should be ignored. */
1962#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_ATTITUDE_TARGET_TYPEMASK
1963#define HAVE_ENUM_ATTITUDE_TARGET_TYPEMASK
1964typedef enum ATTITUDE_TARGET_TYPEMASK
1965{
1966 ATTITUDE_TARGET_TYPEMASK_BODY_ROLL_RATE_IGNORE=1, /* Ignore body roll rate | */
1967 ATTITUDE_TARGET_TYPEMASK_BODY_PITCH_RATE_IGNORE=2, /* Ignore body pitch rate | */
1968 ATTITUDE_TARGET_TYPEMASK_BODY_YAW_RATE_IGNORE=4, /* Ignore body yaw rate | */
1969 ATTITUDE_TARGET_TYPEMASK_THRUST_BODY_SET=32, /* Use 3D body thrust setpoint instead of throttle | */
1970 ATTITUDE_TARGET_TYPEMASK_THROTTLE_IGNORE=64, /* Ignore throttle | */
1971 ATTITUDE_TARGET_TYPEMASK_ATTITUDE_IGNORE=128, /* Ignore attitude | */
1972 ATTITUDE_TARGET_TYPEMASK_ENUM_END=129, /* | */
1973} ATTITUDE_TARGET_TYPEMASK;
1974#endif
1975
1976/** @brief Airborne status of UAS. */
1977#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_UTM_FLIGHT_STATE
1978#define HAVE_ENUM_UTM_FLIGHT_STATE
1979typedef enum UTM_FLIGHT_STATE
1980{
1981 UTM_FLIGHT_STATE_UNKNOWN=1, /* The flight state can't be determined. | */
1982 UTM_FLIGHT_STATE_GROUND=2, /* UAS on ground. | */
1983 UTM_FLIGHT_STATE_AIRBORNE=3, /* UAS airborne. | */
1984 UTM_FLIGHT_STATE_EMERGENCY=16, /* UAS is in an emergency flight state. | */
1985 UTM_FLIGHT_STATE_NOCTRL=32, /* UAS has no active controls. | */
1986 UTM_FLIGHT_STATE_ENUM_END=33, /* | */
1987} UTM_FLIGHT_STATE;
1988#endif
1989
1990/** @brief Flags for the global position report. */
1991#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS
1992#define HAVE_ENUM_UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS
1993typedef enum UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS
1994{
1995 UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS_TIME_VALID=1, /* The field time contains valid data. | */
1996 UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS_UAS_ID_AVAILABLE=2, /* The field uas_id contains valid data. | */
1997 UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS_POSITION_AVAILABLE=4, /* The fields lat, lon and h_acc contain valid data. | */
1998 UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS_ALTITUDE_AVAILABLE=8, /* The fields alt and v_acc contain valid data. | */
1999 UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS_RELATIVE_ALTITUDE_AVAILABLE=16, /* The field relative_alt contains valid data. | */
2000 UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS_HORIZONTAL_VELO_AVAILABLE=32, /* The fields vx and vy contain valid data. | */
2001 UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS_VERTICAL_VELO_AVAILABLE=64, /* The field vz contains valid data. | */
2002 UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS_NEXT_WAYPOINT_AVAILABLE=128, /* The fields next_lat, next_lon and next_alt contain valid data. | */
2003 UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS_ENUM_END=129, /* | */
2004} UTM_DATA_AVAIL_FLAGS;
2005#endif
2006
2007/** @brief These flags encode the cellular network status */
2008#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG
2009#define HAVE_ENUM_CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG
2010typedef enum CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG
2011{
2012 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_UNKNOWN=0, /* State unknown or not reportable. | */
2013 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_FAILED=1, /* Modem is unusable | */
2014 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_INITIALIZING=2, /* Modem is being initialized | */
2015 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_LOCKED=3, /* Modem is locked | */
2016 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_DISABLED=4, /* Modem is not enabled and is powered down | */
2017 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_DISABLING=5, /* Modem is currently transitioning to the CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_DISABLED state | */
2018 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_ENABLING=6, /* Modem is currently transitioning to the CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_ENABLED state | */
2019 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_ENABLED=7, /* Modem is enabled and powered on but not registered with a network provider and not available for data connections | */
2020 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_SEARCHING=8, /* Modem is searching for a network provider to register | */
2021 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_REGISTERED=9, /* Modem is registered with a network provider, and data connections and messaging may be available for use | */
2022 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_DISCONNECTING=10, /* Modem is disconnecting and deactivating the last active packet data bearer. This state will not be entered if more than one packet data bearer is active and one of the active bearers is deactivated | */
2023 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_CONNECTING=11, /* Modem is activating and connecting the first packet data bearer. Subsequent bearer activations when another bearer is already active do not cause this state to be entered | */
2024 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_CONNECTED=12, /* One or more packet data bearers is active and connected | */
2025 CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG_ENUM_END=13, /* | */
2026} CELLULAR_STATUS_FLAG;
2027#endif
2028
2029/** @brief These flags are used to diagnose the failure state of CELLULAR_STATUS */
2030#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_CELLULAR_NETWORK_FAILED_REASON
2031#define HAVE_ENUM_CELLULAR_NETWORK_FAILED_REASON
2032typedef enum CELLULAR_NETWORK_FAILED_REASON
2033{
2034 CELLULAR_NETWORK_FAILED_REASON_NONE=0, /* No error | */
2035 CELLULAR_NETWORK_FAILED_REASON_UNKNOWN=1, /* Error state is unknown | */
2036 CELLULAR_NETWORK_FAILED_REASON_SIM_MISSING=2, /* SIM is required for the modem but missing | */
2037 CELLULAR_NETWORK_FAILED_REASON_SIM_ERROR=3, /* SIM is available, but not usable for connection | */
2038 CELLULAR_NETWORK_FAILED_REASON_ENUM_END=4, /* | */
2039} CELLULAR_NETWORK_FAILED_REASON;
2040#endif
2041
2042/** @brief Cellular network radio type */
2043#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_CELLULAR_NETWORK_RADIO_TYPE
2044#define HAVE_ENUM_CELLULAR_NETWORK_RADIO_TYPE
2045typedef enum CELLULAR_NETWORK_RADIO_TYPE
2046{
2047 CELLULAR_NETWORK_RADIO_TYPE_NONE=0, /* | */
2048 CELLULAR_NETWORK_RADIO_TYPE_GSM=1, /* | */
2049 CELLULAR_NETWORK_RADIO_TYPE_CDMA=2, /* | */
2050 CELLULAR_NETWORK_RADIO_TYPE_WCDMA=3, /* | */
2051 CELLULAR_NETWORK_RADIO_TYPE_LTE=4, /* | */
2052 CELLULAR_NETWORK_RADIO_TYPE_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
2053} CELLULAR_NETWORK_RADIO_TYPE;
2054#endif
2055
2056/** @brief Precision land modes (used in MAV_CMD_NAV_LAND). */
2057#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_PRECISION_LAND_MODE
2058#define HAVE_ENUM_PRECISION_LAND_MODE
2059typedef enum PRECISION_LAND_MODE
2060{
2061 PRECISION_LAND_MODE_DISABLED=0, /* Normal (non-precision) landing. | */
2062 PRECISION_LAND_MODE_OPPORTUNISTIC=1, /* Use precision landing if beacon detected when land command accepted, otherwise land normally. | */
2063 PRECISION_LAND_MODE_REQUIRED=2, /* Use precision landing, searching for beacon if not found when land command accepted (land normally if beacon cannot be found). | */
2064 PRECISION_LAND_MODE_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
2065} PRECISION_LAND_MODE;
2066#endif
2067
2068/** @brief Parachute actions. Trigger release and enable/disable auto-release. */
2069#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_PARACHUTE_ACTION
2070#define HAVE_ENUM_PARACHUTE_ACTION
2071typedef enum PARACHUTE_ACTION
2072{
2073 PARACHUTE_DISABLE=0, /* Disable auto-release of parachute (i.e. release triggered by crash detectors). | */
2074 PARACHUTE_ENABLE=1, /* Enable auto-release of parachute. | */
2075 PARACHUTE_RELEASE=2, /* Release parachute and kill motors. | */
2076 PARACHUTE_ACTION_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
2077} PARACHUTE_ACTION;
2078#endif
2079
2080/** @brief */

2083typedef enum MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE
2084{
2085 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_UNKNOWN=0, /* Encoding of payload unknown. | */
2086 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_STORM32_RESERVED0=200, /* Registered for STorM32 gimbal controller. | */
2087 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_STORM32_RESERVED1=201, /* Registered for STorM32 gimbal controller. | */
2088 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_STORM32_RESERVED2=202, /* Registered for STorM32 gimbal controller. | */
2089 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_STORM32_RESERVED3=203, /* Registered for STorM32 gimbal controller. | */
2090 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_STORM32_RESERVED4=204, /* Registered for STorM32 gimbal controller. | */
2091 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_STORM32_RESERVED5=205, /* Registered for STorM32 gimbal controller. | */
2092 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_STORM32_RESERVED6=206, /* Registered for STorM32 gimbal controller. | */
2093 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_STORM32_RESERVED7=207, /* Registered for STorM32 gimbal controller. | */
2094 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_STORM32_RESERVED8=208, /* Registered for STorM32 gimbal controller. | */
2095 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_STORM32_RESERVED9=209, /* Registered for STorM32 gimbal controller. | */
2096 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_MODALAI_REMOTE_OSD=210, /* Registered for ModalAI remote OSD protocol. | */
2097 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_MODALAI_ESC_UART_PASSTHRU=211, /* Registered for ModalAI ESC UART passthru protocol. | */
2098 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_MODALAI_IO_UART_PASSTHRU=212, /* Registered for ModalAI vendor use. | */
2099 MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE_ENUM_END=213, /* | */
2100} MAV_TUNNEL_PAYLOAD_TYPE;
2101#endif
2102
2103/** @brief */
2104#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_ID_TYPE
2105#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_ID_TYPE
2106typedef enum MAV_ODID_ID_TYPE
2107{
2108 MAV_ODID_ID_TYPE_NONE=0, /* No type defined. | */
2109 MAV_ODID_ID_TYPE_SERIAL_NUMBER=1, /* Manufacturer Serial Number (ANSI/CTA-2063 format). | */
2110 MAV_ODID_ID_TYPE_CAA_REGISTRATION_ID=2, /* CAA (Civil Aviation Authority) registered ID. Format: [ICAO Country Code].[CAA Assigned ID]. | */
2111 MAV_ODID_ID_TYPE_UTM_ASSIGNED_UUID=3, /* UTM (Unmanned Traffic Management) assigned UUID (RFC4122). | */
2112 MAV_ODID_ID_TYPE_SPECIFIC_SESSION_ID=4, /* A 20 byte ID for a specific flight/session. The exact ID type is indicated by the first byte of uas_id and these type values are managed by ICAO. | */
2113 MAV_ODID_ID_TYPE_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
2114} MAV_ODID_ID_TYPE;
2115#endif
2116
2117/** @brief */
2118#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE
2119#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE
2120typedef enum MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE
2121{
2122 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_NONE=0, /* No UA (Unmanned Aircraft) type defined. | */
2123 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_AEROPLANE=1, /* Aeroplane/Airplane. Fixed wing. | */
2124 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_HELICOPTER_OR_MULTIROTOR=2, /* Helicopter or multirotor. | */
2125 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_GYROPLANE=3, /* Gyroplane. | */
2126 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_HYBRID_LIFT=4, /* VTOL (Vertical Take-Off and Landing). Fixed wing aircraft that can take off vertically. | */
2127 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_ORNITHOPTER=5, /* Ornithopter. | */
2128 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_GLIDER=6, /* Glider. | */
2129 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_KITE=7, /* Kite. | */
2130 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_FREE_BALLOON=8, /* Free Balloon. | */
2131 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_CAPTIVE_BALLOON=9, /* Captive Balloon. | */
2132 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_AIRSHIP=10, /* Airship. E.g. a blimp. | */
2133 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_FREE_FALL_PARACHUTE=11, /* Free Fall/Parachute (unpowered). | */
2134 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_ROCKET=12, /* Rocket. | */
2135 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_TETHERED_POWERED_AIRCRAFT=13, /* Tethered powered aircraft. | */
2136 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_GROUND_OBSTACLE=14, /* Ground Obstacle. | */
2137 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_OTHER=15, /* Other type of aircraft not listed earlier. | */
2138 MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE_ENUM_END=16, /* | */
2139} MAV_ODID_UA_TYPE;
2140#endif
2141
2142/** @brief */
2143#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_STATUS
2144#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_STATUS

2146{
2147 MAV_ODID_STATUS_UNDECLARED=0, /* The status of the (UA) Unmanned Aircraft is undefined. | */
2148 MAV_ODID_STATUS_GROUND=1, /* The UA is on the ground. | */
2149 MAV_ODID_STATUS_AIRBORNE=2, /* The UA is in the air. | */
2150 MAV_ODID_STATUS_EMERGENCY=3, /* The UA is having an emergency. | */
2151 MAV_ODID_STATUS_REMOTE_ID_SYSTEM_FAILURE=4, /* The remote ID system is failing or unreliable in some way. | */
2152 MAV_ODID_STATUS_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
2153} MAV_ODID_STATUS;
2154#endif
2155

2167/** @brief */
2168#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC
2169#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC
2170typedef enum MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC
2171{
2172 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_UNKNOWN=0, /* The horizontal accuracy is unknown. | */
2173 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_10NM=1, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 10 Nautical Miles. 18.52 km. | */
2174 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_4NM=2, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 4 Nautical Miles. 7.408 km. | */
2175 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_2NM=3, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 2 Nautical Miles. 3.704 km. | */
2176 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_1NM=4, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 1 Nautical Miles. 1.852 km. | */
2177 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_0_5NM=5, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 0.5 Nautical Miles. 926 m. | */
2178 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_0_3NM=6, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 0.3 Nautical Miles. 555.6 m. | */
2179 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_0_1NM=7, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 0.1 Nautical Miles. 185.2 m. | */
2180 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_0_05NM=8, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 0.05 Nautical Miles. 92.6 m. | */
2181 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_30_METER=9, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 30 meter. | */
2182 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_10_METER=10, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 10 meter. | */
2183 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_3_METER=11, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 3 meter. | */
2184 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_1_METER=12, /* The horizontal accuracy is smaller than 1 meter. | */
2185 MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC_ENUM_END=13, /* | */
2186} MAV_ODID_HOR_ACC;
2187#endif
2188

2191#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_VER_ACC
2192typedef enum MAV_ODID_VER_ACC
2193{
2194 MAV_ODID_VER_ACC_UNKNOWN=0, /* The vertical accuracy is unknown. | */
2195 MAV_ODID_VER_ACC_150_METER=1, /* The vertical accuracy is smaller than 150 meter. | */
2196 MAV_ODID_VER_ACC_45_METER=2, /* The vertical accuracy is smaller than 45 meter. | */
2197 MAV_ODID_VER_ACC_25_METER=3, /* The vertical accuracy is smaller than 25 meter. | */
2198 MAV_ODID_VER_ACC_10_METER=4, /* The vertical accuracy is smaller than 10 meter. | */
2199 MAV_ODID_VER_ACC_3_METER=5, /* The vertical accuracy is smaller than 3 meter. | */
2200 MAV_ODID_VER_ACC_1_METER=6, /* The vertical accuracy is smaller than 1 meter. | */
2201 MAV_ODID_VER_ACC_ENUM_END=7, /* | */
2202} MAV_ODID_VER_ACC;
2203#endif
2204
2205/** @brief */

2212 MAV_ODID_SPEED_ACC_3_METERS_PER_SECOND=2, /* The speed accuracy is smaller than 3 meters per second. | */
2213 MAV_ODID_SPEED_ACC_1_METERS_PER_SECOND=3, /* The speed accuracy is smaller than 1 meters per second. | */
2214 MAV_ODID_SPEED_ACC_0_3_METERS_PER_SECOND=4, /* The speed accuracy is smaller than 0.3 meters per second. | */
2215 MAV_ODID_SPEED_ACC_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
2216} MAV_ODID_SPEED_ACC;
2217#endif

2219/** @brief */

2221#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC
2222typedef enum MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC
2223{
2224 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_UNKNOWN=0, /* The timestamp accuracy is unknown. | */
2225 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_0_1_SECOND=1, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 0.1 second. | */
2226 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_0_2_SECOND=2, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 0.2 second. | */
2227 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_0_3_SECOND=3, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 0.3 second. | */
2228 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_0_4_SECOND=4, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 0.4 second. | */
2229 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_0_5_SECOND=5, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 0.5 second. | */
2230 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_0_6_SECOND=6, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 0.6 second. | */
2231 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_0_7_SECOND=7, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 0.7 second. | */
2232 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_0_8_SECOND=8, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 0.8 second. | */
2233 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_0_9_SECOND=9, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 0.9 second. | */
2234 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_1_0_SECOND=10, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 1.0 second. | */
2235 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_1_1_SECOND=11, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 1.1 second. | */
2236 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_1_2_SECOND=12, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 1.2 second. | */
2237 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_1_3_SECOND=13, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 1.3 second. | */
2238 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_1_4_SECOND=14, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 1.4 second. | */
2239 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_1_5_SECOND=15, /* The timestamp accuracy is smaller than or equal to 1.5 second. | */
2240 MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC_ENUM_END=16, /* | */
2241} MAV_ODID_TIME_ACC;
2242#endif

2244/** @brief */
2245#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_AUTH_TYPE
2246#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_AUTH_TYPE
2247typedef enum MAV_ODID_AUTH_TYPE
2248{
2249 MAV_ODID_AUTH_TYPE_NONE=0, /* No authentication type is specified. | */
2250 MAV_ODID_AUTH_TYPE_UAS_ID_SIGNATURE=1, /* Signature for the UAS (Unmanned Aircraft System) ID. | */
2251 MAV_ODID_AUTH_TYPE_OPERATOR_ID_SIGNATURE=2, /* Signature for the Operator ID. | */
2252 MAV_ODID_AUTH_TYPE_MESSAGE_SET_SIGNATURE=3, /* Signature for the entire message set. | */
2253 MAV_ODID_AUTH_TYPE_NETWORK_REMOTE_ID=4, /* Authentication is provided by Network Remote ID. | */
2254 MAV_ODID_AUTH_TYPE_SPECIFIC_AUTHENTICATION=5, /* The exact authentication type is indicated by the first byte of authentication_data and these type values are managed by ICAO. | */
2255 MAV_ODID_AUTH_TYPE_ENUM_END=6, /* | */
2256} MAV_ODID_AUTH_TYPE;
2257#endif
2258
2259/** @brief */
2260#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_DESC_TYPE
2261#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_DESC_TYPE
2262typedef enum MAV_ODID_DESC_TYPE
2263{
2264 MAV_ODID_DESC_TYPE_TEXT=0, /* Optional free-form text description of the purpose of the flight. | */
2265 MAV_ODID_DESC_TYPE_EMERGENCY=1, /* Optional additional clarification when status == MAV_ODID_STATUS_EMERGENCY. | */
2266 MAV_ODID_DESC_TYPE_EXTENDED_STATUS=2, /* Optional additional clarification when status != MAV_ODID_STATUS_EMERGENCY. | */
2267 MAV_ODID_DESC_TYPE_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
2268} MAV_ODID_DESC_TYPE;
2269#endif
2270
2271/** @brief */
2272#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_OPERATOR_LOCATION_TYPE
2273#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_OPERATOR_LOCATION_TYPE
2274typedef enum MAV_ODID_OPERATOR_LOCATION_TYPE
2275{
2276 MAV_ODID_OPERATOR_LOCATION_TYPE_TAKEOFF=0, /* The location/altitude of the operator is the same as the take-off location. | */
2277 MAV_ODID_OPERATOR_LOCATION_TYPE_LIVE_GNSS=1, /* The location/altitude of the operator is dynamic. E.g. based on live GNSS data. | */
2278 MAV_ODID_OPERATOR_LOCATION_TYPE_FIXED=2, /* The location/altitude of the operator are fixed values. | */
2279 MAV_ODID_OPERATOR_LOCATION_TYPE_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
2280} MAV_ODID_OPERATOR_LOCATION_TYPE;
2281#endif
2282
2283/** @brief */
2284#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_CLASSIFICATION_TYPE
2285#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_CLASSIFICATION_TYPE
2286typedef enum MAV_ODID_CLASSIFICATION_TYPE
2287{
2288 MAV_ODID_CLASSIFICATION_TYPE_UNDECLARED=0, /* The classification type for the UA is undeclared. | */
2289 MAV_ODID_CLASSIFICATION_TYPE_EU=1, /* The classification type for the UA follows EU (European Union) specifications. | */
2290 MAV_ODID_CLASSIFICATION_TYPE_ENUM_END=2, /* | */
2291} MAV_ODID_CLASSIFICATION_TYPE;
2292#endif
2293
2294/** @brief */
2295#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_CATEGORY_EU
2296#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_CATEGORY_EU
2297typedef enum MAV_ODID_CATEGORY_EU
2298{
2299 MAV_ODID_CATEGORY_EU_UNDECLARED=0, /* The category for the UA, according to the EU specification, is undeclared. | */
2300 MAV_ODID_CATEGORY_EU_OPEN=1, /* The category for the UA, according to the EU specification, is the Open category. | */
2301 MAV_ODID_CATEGORY_EU_SPECIFIC=2, /* The category for the UA, according to the EU specification, is the Specific category. | */
2302 MAV_ODID_CATEGORY_EU_CERTIFIED=3, /* The category for the UA, according to the EU specification, is the Certified category. | */
2303 MAV_ODID_CATEGORY_EU_ENUM_END=4, /* | */
2304} MAV_ODID_CATEGORY_EU;
2305#endif
2306
2307/** @brief */

2309#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU
2310typedef enum MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU
2311{
2312 MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU_UNDECLARED=0, /* The class for the UA, according to the EU specification, is undeclared. | */
2313 MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU_CLASS_0=1, /* The class for the UA, according to the EU specification, is Class 0. | */
2314 MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU_CLASS_1=2, /* The class for the UA, according to the EU specification, is Class 1. | */
2315 MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU_CLASS_2=3, /* The class for the UA, according to the EU specification, is Class 2. | */
2316 MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU_CLASS_3=4, /* The class for the UA, according to the EU specification, is Class 3. | */
2317 MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU_CLASS_4=5, /* The class for the UA, according to the EU specification, is Class 4. | */
2318 MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU_CLASS_5=6, /* The class for the UA, according to the EU specification, is Class 5. | */
2319 MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU_CLASS_6=7, /* The class for the UA, according to the EU specification, is Class 6. | */
2320 MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU_ENUM_END=8, /* | */
2321} MAV_ODID_CLASS_EU;
2322#endif

2345/** @brief Tune formats (used for vehicle buzzer/tone generation). */
2346#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_TUNE_FORMAT
2347#define HAVE_ENUM_TUNE_FORMAT
2348typedef enum TUNE_FORMAT
2349{
2350 TUNE_FORMAT_QBASIC1_1=1, /* Format is QBasic 1.1 Play: https://www.qbasic.net/en/reference/qb11/Statement/PLAY-006.htm. | */
2351 TUNE_FORMAT_MML_MODERN=2, /* Format is Modern Music Markup Language (MML): https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Music_Macro_Language#Modern_MML. | */
2352 TUNE_FORMAT_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
2353} TUNE_FORMAT;
2354#endif

2356/** @brief Type of AIS vessel, enum duplicated from AIS standard, https://gpsd.gitlab.io/gpsd/AIVDM.html */
2357#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_AIS_TYPE
2358#define HAVE_ENUM_AIS_TYPE
2359typedef enum AIS_TYPE
2360{
2361 AIS_TYPE_UNKNOWN=0, /* Not available (default). | */
2362 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_1=1, /* | */
2363 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_2=2, /* | */
2364 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_3=3, /* | */
2365 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_4=4, /* | */
2366 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_5=5, /* | */
2367 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_6=6, /* | */
2368 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_7=7, /* | */
2369 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_8=8, /* | */
2370 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_9=9, /* | */
2371 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_10=10, /* | */
2372 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_11=11, /* | */
2373 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_12=12, /* | */
2374 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_13=13, /* | */
2375 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_14=14, /* | */
2376 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_15=15, /* | */
2377 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_16=16, /* | */
2378 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_17=17, /* | */
2379 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_18=18, /* | */
2380 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_19=19, /* | */
2381 AIS_TYPE_WIG=20, /* Wing In Ground effect. | */
2382 AIS_TYPE_WIG_HAZARDOUS_A=21, /* | */
2383 AIS_TYPE_WIG_HAZARDOUS_B=22, /* | */
2384 AIS_TYPE_WIG_HAZARDOUS_C=23, /* | */
2385 AIS_TYPE_WIG_HAZARDOUS_D=24, /* | */
2386 AIS_TYPE_WIG_RESERVED_1=25, /* | */
2387 AIS_TYPE_WIG_RESERVED_2=26, /* | */
2388 AIS_TYPE_WIG_RESERVED_3=27, /* | */
2389 AIS_TYPE_WIG_RESERVED_4=28, /* | */
2390 AIS_TYPE_WIG_RESERVED_5=29, /* | */
2391 AIS_TYPE_FISHING=30, /* | */
2392 AIS_TYPE_TOWING=31, /* | */
2393 AIS_TYPE_TOWING_LARGE=32, /* Towing: length exceeds 200m or breadth exceeds 25m. | */
2394 AIS_TYPE_DREDGING=33, /* Dredging or other underwater ops. | */
2395 AIS_TYPE_DIVING=34, /* | */
2396 AIS_TYPE_MILITARY=35, /* | */
2397 AIS_TYPE_SAILING=36, /* | */
2398 AIS_TYPE_PLEASURE=37, /* | */
2399 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_20=38, /* | */
2400 AIS_TYPE_RESERVED_21=39, /* | */
2401 AIS_TYPE_HSC=40, /* High Speed Craft. | */
2402 AIS_TYPE_HSC_HAZARDOUS_A=41, /* | */
2403 AIS_TYPE_HSC_HAZARDOUS_B=42, /* | */
2404 AIS_TYPE_HSC_HAZARDOUS_C=43, /* | */
2405 AIS_TYPE_HSC_HAZARDOUS_D=44, /* | */
2406 AIS_TYPE_HSC_RESERVED_1=45, /* | */
2407 AIS_TYPE_HSC_RESERVED_2=46, /* | */
2408 AIS_TYPE_HSC_RESERVED_3=47, /* | */
2409 AIS_TYPE_HSC_RESERVED_4=48, /* | */
2410 AIS_TYPE_HSC_UNKNOWN=49, /* | */
2411 AIS_TYPE_PILOT=50, /* | */
2412 AIS_TYPE_SAR=51, /* Search And Rescue vessel. | */
2413 AIS_TYPE_TUG=52, /* | */
2414 AIS_TYPE_PORT_TENDER=53, /* | */
2415 AIS_TYPE_ANTI_POLLUTION=54, /* Anti-pollution equipment. | */
2416 AIS_TYPE_LAW_ENFORCEMENT=55, /* | */
2417 AIS_TYPE_SPARE_LOCAL_1=56, /* | */
2418 AIS_TYPE_SPARE_LOCAL_2=57, /* | */
2419 AIS_TYPE_MEDICAL_TRANSPORT=58, /* | */
2420 AIS_TYPE_NONECOMBATANT=59, /* Noncombatant ship according to RR Resolution No. 18. | */
2421 AIS_TYPE_PASSENGER=60, /* | */
2422 AIS_TYPE_PASSENGER_HAZARDOUS_A=61, /* | */
2423 AIS_TYPE_PASSENGER_HAZARDOUS_B=62, /* | */
2424 AIS_TYPE_PASSENGER_HAZARDOUS_C=63, /* | */
2425 AIS_TYPE_PASSENGER_HAZARDOUS_D=64, /* | */
2426 AIS_TYPE_PASSENGER_RESERVED_1=65, /* | */
2427 AIS_TYPE_PASSENGER_RESERVED_2=66, /* | */
2428 AIS_TYPE_PASSENGER_RESERVED_3=67, /* | */
2429 AIS_TYPE_PASSENGER_RESERVED_4=68, /* | */
2430 AIS_TYPE_PASSENGER_UNKNOWN=69, /* | */
2431 AIS_TYPE_CARGO=70, /* | */
2432 AIS_TYPE_CARGO_HAZARDOUS_A=71, /* | */
2433 AIS_TYPE_CARGO_HAZARDOUS_B=72, /* | */
2434 AIS_TYPE_CARGO_HAZARDOUS_C=73, /* | */
2435 AIS_TYPE_CARGO_HAZARDOUS_D=74, /* | */
2436 AIS_TYPE_CARGO_RESERVED_1=75, /* | */
2437 AIS_TYPE_CARGO_RESERVED_2=76, /* | */
2438 AIS_TYPE_CARGO_RESERVED_3=77, /* | */
2439 AIS_TYPE_CARGO_RESERVED_4=78, /* | */
2440 AIS_TYPE_CARGO_UNKNOWN=79, /* | */
2441 AIS_TYPE_TANKER=80, /* | */
2442 AIS_TYPE_TANKER_HAZARDOUS_A=81, /* | */
2443 AIS_TYPE_TANKER_HAZARDOUS_B=82, /* | */
2444 AIS_TYPE_TANKER_HAZARDOUS_C=83, /* | */
2445 AIS_TYPE_TANKER_HAZARDOUS_D=84, /* | */
2446 AIS_TYPE_TANKER_RESERVED_1=85, /* | */
2447 AIS_TYPE_TANKER_RESERVED_2=86, /* | */
2448 AIS_TYPE_TANKER_RESERVED_3=87, /* | */
2449 AIS_TYPE_TANKER_RESERVED_4=88, /* | */
2450 AIS_TYPE_TANKER_UNKNOWN=89, /* | */
2451 AIS_TYPE_OTHER=90, /* | */
2452 AIS_TYPE_OTHER_HAZARDOUS_A=91, /* | */
2453 AIS_TYPE_OTHER_HAZARDOUS_B=92, /* | */
2454 AIS_TYPE_OTHER_HAZARDOUS_C=93, /* | */
2455 AIS_TYPE_OTHER_HAZARDOUS_D=94, /* | */
2456 AIS_TYPE_OTHER_RESERVED_1=95, /* | */
2457 AIS_TYPE_OTHER_RESERVED_2=96, /* | */
2458 AIS_TYPE_OTHER_RESERVED_3=97, /* | */
2459 AIS_TYPE_OTHER_RESERVED_4=98, /* | */
2460 AIS_TYPE_OTHER_UNKNOWN=99, /* | */
2461 AIS_TYPE_ENUM_END=100, /* | */
2462} AIS_TYPE;
2463#endif

2465/** @brief Navigational status of AIS vessel, enum duplicated from AIS standard, https://gpsd.gitlab.io/gpsd/AIVDM.html */
2466#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_AIS_NAV_STATUS
2467#define HAVE_ENUM_AIS_NAV_STATUS
2468typedef enum AIS_NAV_STATUS
2469{
2470 AIS_NAV_STATUS_UNDER_WAY=0, /* Under way using engine. | */
2471 AIS_NAV_STATUS_ANCHORED=1, /* | */
2472 AIS_NAV_STATUS_UN_COMMANDED=2, /* | */
2473 AIS_NAV_STATUS_RESTRICTED_MANOEUVERABILITY=3, /* | */
2474 AIS_NAV_STATUS_DRAUGHT_CONSTRAINED=4, /* | */
2475 AIS_NAV_STATUS_MOORED=5, /* | */
2476 AIS_NAV_STATUS_AGROUND=6, /* | */
2477 AIS_NAV_STATUS_FISHING=7, /* | */
2478 AIS_NAV_STATUS_SAILING=8, /* | */
2479 AIS_NAV_STATUS_RESERVED_HSC=9, /* | */
2480 AIS_NAV_STATUS_RESERVED_WIG=10, /* | */
2481 AIS_NAV_STATUS_RESERVED_1=11, /* | */
2482 AIS_NAV_STATUS_RESERVED_2=12, /* | */
2483 AIS_NAV_STATUS_RESERVED_3=13, /* | */
2484 AIS_NAV_STATUS_AIS_SART=14, /* Search And Rescue Transponder. | */
2485 AIS_NAV_STATUS_UNKNOWN=15, /* Not available (default). | */
2486 AIS_NAV_STATUS_ENUM_END=16, /* | */
2487} AIS_NAV_STATUS;
2488#endif
2489
2490/** @brief These flags are used in the AIS_VESSEL.fields bitmask to indicate validity of data in the other message fields. When set, the data is valid. */
2491#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_AIS_FLAGS
2492#define HAVE_ENUM_AIS_FLAGS
2493typedef enum AIS_FLAGS
2494{
2495 AIS_FLAGS_POSITION_ACCURACY=1, /* 1 = High (Position accuracy less than or equal to 10m), 0 = Low (position accuracy greater than 10m). | */
2496 AIS_FLAGS_VALID_COG=2, /* The COG field contains valid data | */
2497 AIS_FLAGS_VALID_VELOCITY=4, /* The velocity field contains valid data | */
2498 AIS_FLAGS_HIGH_VELOCITY=8, /* 1 = Velocity over 52.5765m/s (102.2 knots) | */
2499 AIS_FLAGS_VALID_TURN_RATE=16, /* The turn_rate field contains valid data | */
2500 AIS_FLAGS_TURN_RATE_SIGN_ONLY=32, /* Only the sign of the returned turn_rate value is valid. The actual turn rate is either greater than 5deg/30s or less than -5deg/30s. | */
2501 AIS_FLAGS_VALID_DIMENSIONS=64, /* | */
2502 AIS_FLAGS_LARGE_BOW_DIMENSION=128, /* Distance to bow is greater than or equal to 511m | */
2503 AIS_FLAGS_LARGE_STERN_DIMENSION=256, /* Distance to stern is greater than or equal to 511m | */
2504 AIS_FLAGS_LARGE_PORT_DIMENSION=512, /* Distance to port side is greater than or equal to 63m | */
2505 AIS_FLAGS_LARGE_STARBOARD_DIMENSION=1024, /* Distance to starboard side is greater than or equal to 63m | */
2506 AIS_FLAGS_VALID_CALLSIGN=2048, /* The callsign field contains valid data | */
2507 AIS_FLAGS_VALID_NAME=4096, /* The name field contains valid data | */
2508 AIS_FLAGS_ENUM_END=4097, /* | */
2509} AIS_FLAGS;
2510#endif
2511
2512/** @brief List of possible units where failures can be injected. */
2513#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_FAILURE_UNIT
2514#define HAVE_ENUM_FAILURE_UNIT
2515typedef enum FAILURE_UNIT
2516{
2517 FAILURE_UNIT_SENSOR_GYRO=0, /* | */
2518 FAILURE_UNIT_SENSOR_ACCEL=1, /* | */
2519 FAILURE_UNIT_SENSOR_MAG=2, /* | */
2520 FAILURE_UNIT_SENSOR_BARO=3, /* | */
2521 FAILURE_UNIT_SENSOR_GPS=4, /* | */
2522 FAILURE_UNIT_SENSOR_OPTICAL_FLOW=5, /* | */
2523 FAILURE_UNIT_SENSOR_VIO=6, /* | */
2524 FAILURE_UNIT_SENSOR_DISTANCE_SENSOR=7, /* | */
2525 FAILURE_UNIT_SENSOR_AIRSPEED=8, /* | */
2526 FAILURE_UNIT_SYSTEM_BATTERY=100, /* | */
2527 FAILURE_UNIT_SYSTEM_MOTOR=101, /* | */
2528 FAILURE_UNIT_SYSTEM_SERVO=102, /* | */
2529 FAILURE_UNIT_SYSTEM_AVOIDANCE=103, /* | */
2530 FAILURE_UNIT_SYSTEM_RC_SIGNAL=104, /* | */
2531 FAILURE_UNIT_SYSTEM_MAVLINK_SIGNAL=105, /* | */
2532 FAILURE_UNIT_ENUM_END=106, /* | */
2533} FAILURE_UNIT;
2534#endif
2535
2536/** @brief List of possible failure type to inject. */
2537#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_FAILURE_TYPE
2538#define HAVE_ENUM_FAILURE_TYPE
2539typedef enum FAILURE_TYPE
2540{
2541 FAILURE_TYPE_OK=0, /* No failure injected, used to reset a previous failure. | */
2542 FAILURE_TYPE_OFF=1, /* Sets unit off, so completely non-responsive. | */
2543 FAILURE_TYPE_STUCK=2, /* Unit is stuck e.g. keeps reporting the same value. | */
2544 FAILURE_TYPE_GARBAGE=3, /* Unit is reporting complete garbage. | */
2545 FAILURE_TYPE_WRONG=4, /* Unit is consistently wrong. | */
2546 FAILURE_TYPE_SLOW=5, /* Unit is slow, so e.g. reporting at slower than expected rate. | */
2547 FAILURE_TYPE_DELAYED=6, /* Data of unit is delayed in time. | */
2548 FAILURE_TYPE_INTERMITTENT=7, /* Unit is sometimes working, sometimes not. | */
2549 FAILURE_TYPE_ENUM_END=8, /* | */
2550} FAILURE_TYPE;
2551#endif
2552
2553/** @brief */
2554#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_NAV_VTOL_LAND_OPTIONS
2555#define HAVE_ENUM_NAV_VTOL_LAND_OPTIONS
2556typedef enum NAV_VTOL_LAND_OPTIONS
2557{
2558 NAV_VTOL_LAND_OPTIONS_DEFAULT=0, /* Default autopilot landing behaviour. | */
2559 NAV_VTOL_LAND_OPTIONS_FW_SPIRAL_APPROACH=1, /* Use a fixed wing spiral desent approach before landing. | */
2560 NAV_VTOL_LAND_OPTIONS_FW_APPROACH=2, /* Use a fixed wing approach before detransitioning and landing vertically. | */
2561 NAV_VTOL_LAND_OPTIONS_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
2562} NAV_VTOL_LAND_OPTIONS;
2563#endif
2564
2565/** @brief Winch status flags used in WINCH_STATUS */
2566#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_WINCH_STATUS_FLAG
2567#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_WINCH_STATUS_FLAG
2568typedef enum MAV_WINCH_STATUS_FLAG
2569{
2570 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_HEALTHY=1, /* Winch is healthy | */
2571 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_FULLY_RETRACTED=2, /* Winch line is fully retracted | */
2572 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_MOVING=4, /* Winch motor is moving | */
2573 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_CLUTCH_ENGAGED=8, /* Winch clutch is engaged allowing motor to move freely. | */
2574 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_LOCKED=16, /* Winch is locked by locking mechanism. | */
2575 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_DROPPING=32, /* Winch is gravity dropping payload. | */
2576 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_ARRESTING=64, /* Winch is arresting payload descent. | */
2577 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_GROUND_SENSE=128, /* Winch is using torque measurements to sense the ground. | */
2578 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_RETRACTING=256, /* Winch is returning to the fully retracted position. | */
2579 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_REDELIVER=512, /* Winch is redelivering the payload. This is a failover state if the line tension goes above a threshold during RETRACTING. | */
2580 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_ABANDON_LINE=1024, /* Winch is abandoning the line and possibly payload. Winch unspools the entire calculated line length. This is a failover state from REDELIVER if the number of attempts exceeds a threshold. | */
2581 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_LOCKING=2048, /* Winch is engaging the locking mechanism. | */
2582 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_LOAD_LINE=4096, /* Winch is spooling on line. | */
2583 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_LOAD_PAYLOAD=8192, /* Winch is loading a payload. | */
2584 MAV_WINCH_STATUS_FLAG_ENUM_END=8193, /* | */
2585} MAV_WINCH_STATUS_FLAG;
2586#endif
2587
2588/** @brief */
2589#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAG_CAL_STATUS
2590#define HAVE_ENUM_MAG_CAL_STATUS
2591typedef enum MAG_CAL_STATUS
2592{
2593 MAG_CAL_NOT_STARTED=0, /* | */
2594 MAG_CAL_WAITING_TO_START=1, /* | */
2595 MAG_CAL_RUNNING_STEP_ONE=2, /* | */
2596 MAG_CAL_RUNNING_STEP_TWO=3, /* | */
2597 MAG_CAL_SUCCESS=4, /* | */
2598 MAG_CAL_FAILED=5, /* | */
2599 MAG_CAL_BAD_ORIENTATION=6, /* | */
2600 MAG_CAL_BAD_RADIUS=7, /* | */
2601 MAG_CAL_STATUS_ENUM_END=8, /* | */
2602} MAG_CAL_STATUS;
2603#endif

2610 MAV_EVENT_ERROR_REASON_UNAVAILABLE=0, /* The requested event is not available (anymore). | */
2611 MAV_EVENT_ERROR_REASON_ENUM_END=1, /* | */
2612} MAV_EVENT_ERROR_REASON;

2614
2615/** @brief Flags for CURRENT_EVENT_SEQUENCE. */

2617#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_EVENT_CURRENT_SEQUENCE_FLAGS
2618typedef enum MAV_EVENT_CURRENT_SEQUENCE_FLAGS
2619{
2620 MAV_EVENT_CURRENT_SEQUENCE_FLAGS_RESET=1, /* A sequence reset has happened (e.g. vehicle reboot). | */
2621 MAV_EVENT_CURRENT_SEQUENCE_FLAGS_ENUM_END=2, /* | */
2622} MAV_EVENT_CURRENT_SEQUENCE_FLAGS;

2624
2625/** @brief Flags in the HIL_SENSOR message indicate which fields have updated since the last message */
2626#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_FLAGS
2627#define HAVE_ENUM_HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_FLAGS
2628typedef enum HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_FLAGS
2629{
2630 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_XACC=1, /* The value in the xacc field has been updated | */
2631 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_YACC=2, /* The value in the yacc field has been updated | */
2632 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_ZACC=4, /* The value in the zacc field has been updated | */
2633 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_XGYRO=8, /* The value in the xgyro field has been updated | */
2634 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_YGYRO=16, /* The value in the ygyro field has been updated | */
2635 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_ZGYRO=32, /* The value in the zgyro field has been updated | */
2636 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_XMAG=64, /* The value in the xmag field has been updated | */
2637 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_YMAG=128, /* The value in the ymag field has been updated | */
2638 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_ZMAG=256, /* The value in the zmag field has been updated | */
2639 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_ABS_PRESSURE=512, /* The value in the abs_pressure field has been updated | */
2640 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_DIFF_PRESSURE=1024, /* The value in the diff_pressure field has been updated | */
2641 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_PRESSURE_ALT=2048, /* The value in the pressure_alt field has been updated | */
2642 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_TEMPERATURE=4096, /* The value in the temperature field has been updated | */
2643 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_RESET=2147483648, /* Full reset of attitude/position/velocities/etc was performed in sim (Bit 31). | */
2644 HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_FLAGS_ENUM_END=2147483649, /* | */
2645} HIL_SENSOR_UPDATED_FLAGS;
2646#endif
2647
2648/** @brief Flags in the HIGHRES_IMU message indicate which fields have updated since the last message */
2649#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_FLAGS
2650#define HAVE_ENUM_HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_FLAGS
2651typedef enum HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_FLAGS
2652{
2653 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_XACC=1, /* The value in the xacc field has been updated | */
2654 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_YACC=2, /* The value in the yacc field has been updated | */
2655 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_ZACC=4, /* The value in the zacc field has been updated since | */
2656 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_XGYRO=8, /* The value in the xgyro field has been updated | */
2657 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_YGYRO=16, /* The value in the ygyro field has been updated | */
2658 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_ZGYRO=32, /* The value in the zgyro field has been updated | */
2659 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_XMAG=64, /* The value in the xmag field has been updated | */
2660 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_YMAG=128, /* The value in the ymag field has been updated | */
2661 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_ZMAG=256, /* The value in the zmag field has been updated | */
2662 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_ABS_PRESSURE=512, /* The value in the abs_pressure field has been updated | */
2663 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_DIFF_PRESSURE=1024, /* The value in the diff_pressure field has been updated | */
2664 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_PRESSURE_ALT=2048, /* The value in the pressure_alt field has been updated | */
2665 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_TEMPERATURE=4096, /* The value in the temperature field has been updated | */
2666 HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_FLAGS_ENUM_END=4097, /* | */
2667} HIGHRES_IMU_UPDATED_FLAGS;
2668#endif
2669
2670/** @brief */
2671#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_CAN_FILTER_OP
2672#define HAVE_ENUM_CAN_FILTER_OP
2673typedef enum CAN_FILTER_OP
2674{
2675 CAN_FILTER_REPLACE=0, /* | */
2676 CAN_FILTER_ADD=1, /* | */
2677 CAN_FILTER_REMOVE=2, /* | */
2678 CAN_FILTER_OP_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
2679} CAN_FILTER_OP;
2680#endif
2681
2682/** @brief MAV FTP error codes (may be used in FILE_TRANSFER_PROTOCOL). See https://mavlink.io/en/services/ftp.html. */
2683#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_FTP_ERR
2684#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_FTP_ERR
2685typedef enum MAV_FTP_ERR
2686{
2687 MAV_FTP_ERR_NONE=0, /* None: No error | */
2688 MAV_FTP_ERR_FAIL=1, /* Fail: Unknown failure | */
2689 MAV_FTP_ERR_FAILERRNO=2, /* FailErrno: Command failed, Err number sent back in PayloadHeader.data[1].
2690 This is a file-system error number understood by the server operating system. | */
2691 MAV_FTP_ERR_INVALIDDATASIZE=3, /* InvalidDataSize: Payload size is invalid | */
2692 MAV_FTP_ERR_INVALIDSESSION=4, /* InvalidSession: Session is not currently open | */
2693 MAV_FTP_ERR_NOSESSIONSAVAILABLE=5, /* NoSessionsAvailable: All available sessions are already in use | */
2694 MAV_FTP_ERR_EOF=6, /* EOF: Offset past end of file for ListDirectory and ReadFile commands | */
2695 MAV_FTP_ERR_UNKNOWNCOMMAND=7, /* UnknownCommand: Unknown command / opcode | */
2696 MAV_FTP_ERR_FILEEXISTS=8, /* FileExists: File/directory already exists | */
2697 MAV_FTP_ERR_FILEPROTECTED=9, /* FileProtected: File/directory is write protected | */
2698 MAV_FTP_ERR_FILENOTFOUND=10, /* FileNotFound: File/directory not found | */
2699 MAV_FTP_ERR_ENUM_END=11, /* | */
2700} MAV_FTP_ERR;
2701#endif
2702
2703/** @brief MAV FTP opcodes (may be used in FILE_TRANSFER_PROTOCOL). See https://mavlink.io/en/services/ftp.html. */
2704#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_FTP_OPCODE
2705#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_FTP_OPCODE
2706typedef enum MAV_FTP_OPCODE
2707{
2708 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_NONE=0, /* None. Ignored, always ACKed | */
2709 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_TERMINATESESSION=1, /* TerminateSession: Terminates open Read session | */
2710 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_RESETSESSION=2, /* ResetSessions: Terminates all open read sessions | */
2711 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_LISTDIRECTORY=3, /* ListDirectory. List files and directories in path from offset | */
2712 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_OPENFILERO=4, /* OpenFileRO: Opens file at path for reading, returns session | */
2713 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_READFILE=5, /* ReadFile: Reads size bytes from offset in session | */
2714 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_CREATEFILE=6, /* CreateFile: Creates file at path for writing, returns session | */
2715 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_WRITEFILE=7, /* WriteFile: Writes size bytes to offset in session | */
2716 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_REMOVEFILE=8, /* RemoveFile: Remove file at path | */
2717 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_CREATEDIRECTORY=9, /* CreateDirectory: Creates directory at path | */
2718 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_REMOVEDIRECTORY=10, /* RemoveDirectory: Removes directory at path. The directory must be empty. | */
2719 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_OPENFILEWO=11, /* OpenFileWO: Opens file at path for writing, returns session | */
2720 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_TRUNCATEFILE=12, /* TruncateFile: Truncate file at path to offset length | */
2721 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_RENAME=13, /* Rename: Rename path1 to path2 | */
2722 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_CALCFILECRC=14, /* CalcFileCRC32: Calculate CRC32 for file at path | */
2723 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_BURSTREADFILE=15, /* BurstReadFile: Burst download session file | */
2724 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_ACK=128, /* ACK: ACK response | */
2725 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_NAK=129, /* NAK: NAK response | */
2726 MAV_FTP_OPCODE_ENUM_END=130, /* | */
2727} MAV_FTP_OPCODE;
2728#endif
2729
2730/** @brief
2731 States of the mission state machine.
2732 Note that these states are independent of whether the mission is in a mode that can execute mission items or not (is suspended).
2733 They may not all be relevant on all vehicles.
2734 */
2735#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MISSION_STATE
2736#define HAVE_ENUM_MISSION_STATE
2737typedef enum MISSION_STATE
2738{
2739 MISSION_STATE_UNKNOWN=0, /* The mission status reporting is not supported. | */
2740 MISSION_STATE_NO_MISSION=1, /* No mission on the vehicle. | */
2741 MISSION_STATE_NOT_STARTED=2, /* Mission has not started. This is the case after a mission has uploaded but not yet started executing. | */
2742 MISSION_STATE_ACTIVE=3, /* Mission is active, and will execute mission items when in auto mode. | */
2743 MISSION_STATE_PAUSED=4, /* Mission is paused when in auto mode. | */
2744 MISSION_STATE_COMPLETE=5, /* Mission has executed all mission items. | */
2745 MISSION_STATE_ENUM_END=6, /* | */
2746} MISSION_STATE;
2747#endif
2748
2749/** @brief
2750 Possible safety switch states.
2751 */
2752#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_SAFETY_SWITCH_STATE
2753#define HAVE_ENUM_SAFETY_SWITCH_STATE
2754typedef enum SAFETY_SWITCH_STATE
2755{
2756 SAFETY_SWITCH_STATE_SAFE=0, /* Safety switch is engaged and vehicle should be safe to approach. | */
2757 SAFETY_SWITCH_STATE_DANGEROUS=1, /* Safety switch is NOT engaged and motors, propellers and other actuators should be considered active. | */
2758 SAFETY_SWITCH_STATE_ENUM_END=2, /* | */
2759} SAFETY_SWITCH_STATE;
2760#endif
2761
2762/** @brief Modes of illuminator */
2763#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_ILLUMINATOR_MODE
2764#define HAVE_ENUM_ILLUMINATOR_MODE
2765typedef enum ILLUMINATOR_MODE
2766{
2767 ILLUMINATOR_MODE_UNKNOWN=0, /* Illuminator mode is not specified/unknown | */
2768 ILLUMINATOR_MODE_INTERNAL_CONTROL=1, /* Illuminator behavior is controlled by MAV_CMD_DO_ILLUMINATOR_CONFIGURE settings | */
2769 ILLUMINATOR_MODE_EXTERNAL_SYNC=2, /* Illuminator behavior is controlled by external factors: e.g. an external hardware signal | */
2770 ILLUMINATOR_MODE_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
2771} ILLUMINATOR_MODE;
2772#endif
2773
2774/** @brief Illuminator module error flags (bitmap, 0 means no error) */
2775#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_ILLUMINATOR_ERROR_FLAGS
2776#define HAVE_ENUM_ILLUMINATOR_ERROR_FLAGS
2777typedef enum ILLUMINATOR_ERROR_FLAGS
2778{
2779 ILLUMINATOR_ERROR_FLAGS_THERMAL_THROTTLING=1, /* Illuminator thermal throttling error. | */
2780 ILLUMINATOR_ERROR_FLAGS_OVER_TEMPERATURE_SHUTDOWN=2, /* Illuminator over temperature shutdown error. | */
2781 ILLUMINATOR_ERROR_FLAGS_THERMISTOR_FAILURE=4, /* Illuminator thermistor failure. | */
2782 ILLUMINATOR_ERROR_FLAGS_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
2783} ILLUMINATOR_ERROR_FLAGS;
2784#endif
2785
2786/** @brief Standard modes with a well understood meaning across flight stacks and vehicle types.
2787 For example, most flight stack have the concept of a "return" or "RTL" mode that takes a vehicle to safety, even though the precise mechanics of this mode may differ.
2788 The modes supported by a flight stack can be queried using AVAILABLE_MODES and set using MAV_CMD_DO_SET_STANDARD_MODE.
2789 The current mode is streamed in CURRENT_MODE.
2790 See https://mavlink.io/en/services/standard_modes.html
2791 */
2792#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_STANDARD_MODE
2793#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_STANDARD_MODE
2794typedef enum MAV_STANDARD_MODE
2795{
2796 MAV_STANDARD_MODE_NON_STANDARD=0, /* Non standard mode.
2797 This may be used when reporting the mode if the current flight mode is not a standard mode.
2798 | */
2799 MAV_STANDARD_MODE_POSITION_HOLD=1, /* Position mode (manual).
2800 Position-controlled and stabilized manual mode.
2801 When sticks are released vehicles return to their level-flight orientation and hold both position and altitude against wind and external forces.
2802 This mode can only be set by vehicles that can hold a fixed position.
2803 Multicopter (MC) vehicles actively brake and hold both position and altitude against wind and external forces.
2804 Hybrid MC/FW ("VTOL") vehicles first transition to multicopter mode (if needed) but otherwise behave in the same way as MC vehicles.
2805 Fixed-wing (FW) vehicles must not support this mode.
2806 Other vehicle types must not support this mode (this may be revisited through the PR process).
2807 | */
2808 MAV_STANDARD_MODE_ORBIT=2, /* Orbit (manual).
2809 Position-controlled and stabilized manual mode.
2810 The vehicle circles around a fixed setpoint in the horizontal plane at a particular radius, altitude, and direction.
2811 Flight stacks may further allow manual control over the setpoint position, radius, direction, speed, and/or altitude of the circle, but this is not mandated.
2812 Flight stacks may support the [MAV_CMD_DO_ORBIT](https://mavlink.io/en/messages/common.html#MAV_CMD_DO_ORBIT) for changing the orbit parameters.
2813 MC and FW vehicles may support this mode.
2814 Hybrid MC/FW ("VTOL") vehicles may support this mode in MC/FW or both modes; if the mode is not supported by the current configuration the vehicle should transition to the supported configuration.
2815 Other vehicle types must not support this mode (this may be revisited through the PR process).
2816 | */
2817 MAV_STANDARD_MODE_CRUISE=3, /* Cruise mode (manual).
2818 Position-controlled and stabilized manual mode.
2819 When sticks are released vehicles return to their level-flight orientation and hold their original track against wind and external forces.
2820 Fixed-wing (FW) vehicles level orientation and maintain current track and altitude against wind and external forces.
2821 Hybrid MC/FW ("VTOL") vehicles first transition to FW mode (if needed) but otherwise behave in the same way as MC vehicles.
2822 Multicopter (MC) vehicles must not support this mode.
2823 Other vehicle types must not support this mode (this may be revisited through the PR process).
2824 | */
2825 MAV_STANDARD_MODE_ALTITUDE_HOLD=4, /* Altitude hold (manual).
2826 Altitude-controlled and stabilized manual mode.
2827 When sticks are released vehicles return to their level-flight orientation and hold their altitude.
2828 MC vehicles continue with existing momentum and may move with wind (or other external forces).
2829 FW vehicles continue with current heading, but may be moved off-track by wind.
2830 Hybrid MC/FW ("VTOL") vehicles behave according to their current configuration/mode (FW or MC).
2831 Other vehicle types must not support this mode (this may be revisited through the PR process).
2832 | */
2833 MAV_STANDARD_MODE_SAFE_RECOVERY=5, /* Safe recovery mode (auto).
2834 Automatic mode that takes vehicle to a predefined safe location via a safe flight path, and may also automatically land the vehicle.
2835 This mode is more commonly referred to as RTL and/or or Smart RTL.
2836 The precise return location, flight path, and landing behaviour depend on vehicle configuration and type.
2837 For example, the vehicle might return to the home/launch location, a rally point, or the start of a mission landing, it might follow a direct path, mission path, or breadcrumb path, and land using a mission landing pattern or some other kind of descent.
2838 | */
2839 MAV_STANDARD_MODE_MISSION=6, /* Mission mode (automatic).
2840 Automatic mode that executes MAVLink missions.
2841 Missions are executed from the current waypoint as soon as the mode is enabled.
2842 | */
2843 MAV_STANDARD_MODE_LAND=7, /* Land mode (auto).
2844 Automatic mode that lands the vehicle at the current location.
2845 The precise landing behaviour depends on vehicle configuration and type.
2846 | */
2847 MAV_STANDARD_MODE_TAKEOFF=8, /* Takeoff mode (auto).
2848 Automatic takeoff mode.
2849 The precise takeoff behaviour depends on vehicle configuration and type.
2850 | */
2851 MAV_STANDARD_MODE_ENUM_END=9, /* | */
2852} MAV_STANDARD_MODE;
2853#endif
2854
2855/** @brief Mode properties.
2856 */
2857#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_MAV_MODE_PROPERTY
2858#define HAVE_ENUM_MAV_MODE_PROPERTY
2859typedef enum MAV_MODE_PROPERTY
2860{
2861 MAV_MODE_PROPERTY_ADVANCED=1, /* If set, this mode is an advanced mode.
2862 For example a rate-controlled manual mode might be advanced, whereas a position-controlled manual mode is not.
2863 A GCS can optionally use this flag to configure the UI for its intended users.
2864 | */
2865 MAV_MODE_PROPERTY_NOT_USER_SELECTABLE=2, /* If set, this mode should not be added to the list of selectable modes.
2866 The mode might still be selected by the FC directly (for example as part of a failsafe).
2867 | */
2868 MAV_MODE_PROPERTY_AUTO_MODE=4, /* If set, this mode is automatically controlled (it may use but does not require a manual controller).
2869 If unset the mode is a assumed to require user input (be a manual mode).
2870 | */
2871 MAV_MODE_PROPERTY_ENUM_END=5, /* | */
2872} MAV_MODE_PROPERTY;
2873#endif
2874
2875/** @brief Flags used in HIL_ACTUATOR_CONTROLS message. */
2876#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_HIL_ACTUATOR_CONTROLS_FLAGS
2877#define HAVE_ENUM_HIL_ACTUATOR_CONTROLS_FLAGS
2878typedef enum HIL_ACTUATOR_CONTROLS_FLAGS
2879{
2880 HIL_ACTUATOR_CONTROLS_FLAGS_LOCKSTEP=1, /* Simulation is using lockstep | */
2881 HIL_ACTUATOR_CONTROLS_FLAGS_ENUM_END=2, /* | */
2882} HIL_ACTUATOR_CONTROLS_FLAGS;
2883#endif
2884
2885/** @brief Flags used to report computer status. */
2886#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_COMPUTER_STATUS_FLAGS
2887#define HAVE_ENUM_COMPUTER_STATUS_FLAGS
2888typedef enum COMPUTER_STATUS_FLAGS
2889{
2890 COMPUTER_STATUS_FLAGS_UNDER_VOLTAGE=1, /* Indicates if the system is experiencing voltage outside of acceptable range. | */
2891 COMPUTER_STATUS_FLAGS_CPU_THROTTLE=2, /* Indicates if CPU throttling is active. | */
2892 COMPUTER_STATUS_FLAGS_THERMAL_THROTTLE=4, /* Indicates if thermal throttling is active. | */
2893 COMPUTER_STATUS_FLAGS_DISK_FULL=8, /* Indicates if main disk is full. | */
2894 COMPUTER_STATUS_FLAGS_ENUM_END=9, /* | */
2895} COMPUTER_STATUS_FLAGS;
2896#endif
2897
2898/** @brief Airspeed sensor flags */
2899#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_AIRSPEED_SENSOR_FLAGS
2900#define HAVE_ENUM_AIRSPEED_SENSOR_FLAGS
2901typedef enum AIRSPEED_SENSOR_FLAGS
2902{
2903 AIRSPEED_SENSOR_UNHEALTHY=1, /* Airspeed sensor is unhealthy | */
2904 AIRSPEED_SENSOR_USING=2, /* True if the data from this sensor is being actively used by the flight controller for guidance, navigation or control. | */
2905 AIRSPEED_SENSOR_FLAGS_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
2906} AIRSPEED_SENSOR_FLAGS;
2907#endif
2908
2909/** @brief Source for GLOBAL_POSITION measurement or estimate. */
2910#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC
2911#define HAVE_ENUM_GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC
2912typedef enum GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC
2913{
2914 GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC_UNKNOWN=0, /* Source is unknown or not one of the listed types. | */
2915 GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC_GNSS=1, /* Global Navigation Satellite System (e.g.: GPS, Galileo, Glonass, BeiDou). | */
2916 GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC_VISION=2, /* Vision system (e.g.: map matching). | */
2917 GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC_PSEUDOLITES=3, /* A pseudo-satellite system using transceiver beacons to perform GNSS-like positioning. | */
2918 GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC_TERRAIN=4, /* Terrain referenced navigation. | */
2919 GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC_MAGNETIC=5, /* Magnetic positioning. | */
2920 GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC_ESTIMATOR=6, /* Estimated position based on various sensors (eg. a Kalman Filter). | */
2921 GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC_ENUM_END=7, /* | */
2922} GLOBAL_POSITION_SRC;
2923#endif
2924
2925/** @brief Status flags for GLOBAL_POSITION */
2926#ifndef HAVE_ENUM_GLOBAL_POSITION_FLAGS
2927#define HAVE_ENUM_GLOBAL_POSITION_FLAGS
2928typedef enum GLOBAL_POSITION_FLAGS
2929{
2930 GLOBAL_POSITION_UNHEALTHY=1, /* Unhealthy sensor/estimator. | */
2931 GLOBAL_POSITION_PRIMARY=2, /* True if the data originates from or is consumed by the primary estimator. | */
2932 GLOBAL_POSITION_FLAGS_ENUM_END=3, /* | */
2933} GLOBAL_POSITION_FLAGS;
2934#endif
2935

2937
2938#ifndef MAVLINK_VERSION
2939#define MAVLINK_VERSION 3
2940#endif
2941
2942#if (MAVLINK_VERSION == 0)
2943#undef MAVLINK_VERSION
2944#define MAVLINK_VERSION 3
2945#endif
